movie.actors: David Schwimmer, Gwyneth Paltrow, Michael Rapaport, Toni Collette
movie.plot: Chaos unfolds as Tom is roped into being a pallbearer (and delivering the eulogy!) by the mother of a recently deceased "friend" from high school that he just can't remember. In the meantime, an unrequited love from high school (NOT the dead guy's girlfriend) reappears in his life.
movie.title: The Pallbearer
